ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Current type of government (e.g., federal, parliamentary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "democratization_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the indicator */,
  "male_suffrage" INTEGER /* Male suffrage (0/1) */,
  "female_suffrage" INTEGER /* Female suffrage (0/1) */,
  "executive_elections" INTEGER /* Executive elections (0/1) */,
  "legislative_elections" INTEGER /* Legislative elections (0/1) */,
  "multi_party_legislative_elections" INTEGER /* Multi-party legislative elections (0/1) */,
  "competitive_elections" INTEGER /* Competitive elections (0/1) */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who participated in the election */,
  "electoral_violence" INTEGER /* Number of incidents of electoral violence */,
  "freedom_of_press" INTEGER /* Index of freedom of the press (0-100) */,
  "civil_liberties" INTEGER /* Index of civil liberties (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_democratization_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, legislative) */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the winner */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who participated in the election */,
  "number_of_contestants" INTEGER /* Number of contestants in the election */,
  "election_type_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the election type (e.g., direct or indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governments" (
  "government_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the government */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., federal, parliamentary) */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the head of state */,
  "head_of_government" TEXT /* Name of the head of government */,
  "legislative_type" TEXT /* Type of legislative body (e.g., unicameral, bicameral) */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the legislative body */,
  "head_of_government_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the head of government's term */,
  "head_of_government_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the head of government's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("government_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "democratic_transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transition */,
  "transition_type" TEXT /* Type of transition (e.g., democratic, authoritarian) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the transition (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "transition_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transition (e.g., reasons, key events) */,
  "international_influence" INTEGER /* Degree of international influence in the transition (0-100) */,
  "domestic_factors" INTEGER /* Degree of domestic factors in the transition (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_democratic_transitions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "democratic_breakdowns" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breakdown */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the breakdown */,
  "breakdown_type" TEXT /* Type of breakdown (e.g., coup, civil war) */,
  "breakdown_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the breakdown (e.g., reasons, key events) */,
  "international_influence" INTEGER /* Degree of international influence in the breakdown (0-100) */,
  "domestic_factors" INTEGER /* Degree of domestic factors in the breakdown (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_democratic_breakdowns_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lexical_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the index */,
  "lexical_index" REAL /* Value of the lexical index */,
  "index_source" TEXT /* Source of the lexical index data (e.g., organization, study) */,
  "index_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lexical_index_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the index */,
  "index_source" TEXT /* Source of the index data (e.g., organization, study) */,
  "index_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
